founder.name: Jyothi Yarramilli
founder.title: Founder & Master Tailor
founder.bio: With over a decade of mastery in traditional and contemporary ladies fashion, Jyothi Yarramilli founded JO'STYLE with a singular vision — to make every woman feel exceptional. From intricate Maggam work to precision blouse stitching, every creation is a testament to her artistry and passion for the craft.

services.name: Computer Embroidery
services.description: Precision machine embroidery with intricate patterns — from florals to geometric designs — crafted for sarees, dupattas, and garments.

services.name: Maggam Work
services.description: Exquisite hand-crafted Maggam embroidery using zardozi, cutwork, and mirror accents. A timeless tradition elevated to modern elegance.

services.name: Blouse Stitching
services.description: Custom-fit blouses tailored to your measurements with designer back patterns, sleeves, and necklines — a perfect match for every saree.

services.name: Saree Pre-Pleating
services.description: Professional saree pre-pleating service so you can drape effortlessly every time. Neat, crisp pleats that stay all day long.

testimonials.name: Priya Reddy
testimonials.text: The blouse stitching is absolutely perfect — fits like a dream. Jyothi garu's attention to detail is unmatched. I won't go anywhere else now!

testimonials.name: Lakshmi Devi
testimonials.text: Got my wedding sarees pre-pleated here. The pleats were so crisp and clean — held the entire evening. Exceptional service and very professional.

testimonials.name: Sravani Rao
testimonials.text: The Maggam work on my blouse is breathtaking. Everyone at the function was asking where I got it done. Highly recommend JO'STYLE!

testimonials.name: Anitha Kumari
testimonials.text: Computer embroidery work on my daughter's frock came out exactly as I imagined. Quick delivery and very reasonable pricing. A hidden gem!
